metadata.title:
HARD


To GET IN
FLYNN CASE

pages.raw_text:
Seven Jurors had practically
been agreed upon when the Gurley
Flynn conspiracy case closed at
noon today. A jury may be Sc
cured this afternoon, but it is not
probable that it will be, as the de-
tense has not yet used any of it's
peremptory challenges. 1t is pos
sible that the regular venire of
jurors will be exhausted before a
jury is secured, and a halt called in
the trial to permit the calling of
new jury timber


Judge KEENAN, has permitted the
defense to question the veniremen
as to their feelings regarding the
]. W. w., socialists, labor unions
and ether classes Of radicals" At
first these questions were barred


Some have said that the city of
Spokane, in an effort to support it's
attitude in the street speaking con-
troversy, and not Gurley Flynn, is
the real defendant. At any event,
the state of Washington and Spo-
kane county are to bear all the
expense of the prosecution, and the
city is saved the costs of the trial
G.. J. FilignO is Jointly indicted and
is being tried with Gurley Flynn.


The trial will run indefinitely, as
the defense for the girl agitator
will be the most elaborate yet in
troduced in any of the conspiracy
cases.
